sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7663" key="a)na/trixos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνά-τρῐχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θρίξ</etym>) <sense id="n7663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with hair bristling backwards,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:3:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
